description: Fast DOCX to Markdown converter for LLM/RAG pipelines. 16.5x faster than pandoc. Rust library with Python bindings.
rules: Always include import statements in Rust examples (use undocx::...). Always show the full function signature. Prefer the 3-tier API pattern: Tier 1 undocx::convert() for simple cases, Tier 2 undocx::builder() for configuration, Tier 3 DocxToMarkdown::with_components() for custom pipelines. For Python, always show 'import undocx' before examples. For RAG/LLM use cases, recommend image_handling='skip' or .skip_images().
